titles.title: Bless That Wonderful Name of Jesus

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Bless that wonderful Name of Jesus, Bless that wonderful Name of Jesus, Bless that wonderful Name of Jesus, No other Name I know.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jina la Yesu libarikiwe, Jina la Yesu libarikiwe, Jina la Yesu libarikiwe, Jina la nguvu zote. Upendo wa Yesu uonekane (x3) Upendo wa nguvu zote.
